raw_text:
Principal Full Stack Engineer
CloudNative Labs — Empowering enterprises to build scalable, resilient cloud architectures with elegant, open-

source-first solutions.

Location

San Francisco, CA (Remote-friendly)

Employment Type

Full-time

Compensation

$280,000 - $380,000 per year

The Opportunity

CloudNative Labs seeks an exceptional Principal Full Stack Engineer to join our platform architecture team.

This is a high-impact leadership position where you'll define our organization-wide technical strategy, architect
next-generation cloud infrastructure solutions, and mentor engineering teams across product domains. You'll

work across the full stack—from TypeScript/React frontends to Node.js microservices to PostgreSQL databases
—while establishing best practices and technical direction for our entire engineering organization. This role
requires 12+ years of experience and a demonstrated track record of leading large-scale distributed systems and
technical transformation initiatives.

About CloudNative Labs

CloudNative Labs is a B2B SaaS platform that provides enterprise-grade infrastructure orchestration and

observability tools for companies managing distributed systems at scale. Founded in 2015, we serve Fortune 500
companies across financial services, e-commerce, and healthcare sectors. Our mission is to make cloud-native
architecture accessible and manageable for organizations of all sizes. We employ 250+ engineers across 5 offices

and are backed by Series C funding.

Day-to-Day

Define and communicate org-wide technical strategy for cloud-native systems, including architecture
decisions, technology choices, and long-term infrastructure roadmap

Design and implement scalable full-stack solutions using Node.js, TypeScript, React, GraphQL, and
PostgreSQL, setting architectural patterns that become standards across teams

Lead cross-functional technical initiatives involving 3+ engineering teams, ensuring alignment with business
objectives and platform scalability requirements

Architect microservices patterns and distributed system designs on AWS/GCP, establishing deployment best
practices and infrastructure-as-code standards using Kubernetes and Terraform

Conduct technology evaluations and vendor assessments for mission-critical infrastructure decisions;

establish guidelines for API design (REST/GraphQL), database scaling, and observability tooling

Mentor and develop senior engineers and tech leads, including conducting technical reviews, architectural
guidance, and career development planning

Drive technical debt reduction initiatives and establish engineering excellence standards across codebases;
establish code review practices and testing frameworks

 Represent engineering in executive strategy sessions; provide technical feasibility assessment for product and
business roadmaps

Lead high-impact projects from conception through delivery, ensuring technical rigor, performance
optimization, and security compliance at every stage

You Have

12+ years of software engineering experience with at least 5+ years in full-stack distributed systems
development

Expert-level proficiency in TypeScript and modern Node.js ecosystems; proven ability to architect and scale
backend systems

Deep experience with React, frontend state management patterns, and building high-performance user
interfaces at scale

Advanced expertise with PostgreSQL and relational database design, including query optimization and
scaling strategies

Demonstrated experience architecting microservices on AWS or GCP, including Kubernetes orchestration,
serverless patterns, and cloud-native deployment

Proven track record of defining technical strategy and influencing engineering direction across multiple
teams or organizations

Strong systems design skills including REST and GraphQL API design, event-driven architectures, and
asynchronous messaging patterns

Bonus

Experience leading technical architectural reviews and establishing engineering standards across large
organizations

Expertise with observability platforms (Prometheus, Datadog, ELK stack) and distributed tracing tools

Open-source contribution history or maintainership of infrastructure/developer tools projects

Experience with infrastructure-as-code frameworks such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or Pulumi

Track record of successful large-scale system migrations or major technical transformations

Published technical writing, conference talks, or recognized thought leadership in cloud architecture or
distributed systems

Our Stack

TypeScript   Node.js   React   GraphQL   PostgreSQL   AWS   Kubernetes   Terraform   Docker   Prometheus

What We Offer

Competitive equity package with refresher grants (0.25-0.5% depending on background)

Comprehensive health coverage including medical, dental, vision for employee and dependents

Unlimited PTO with minimum 15 days recommended; sabbatical program after 5 years

Professional development budget of $5,000/year for conferences, courses, and training

Home office stipend ($2,000) and annual hardware refresh allocation

401(k) matching (4% of salary) with immediate vesting

 Parental leave (16 weeks paid for primary caregiver, 8 weeks for secondary)

Mental health support including therapy coverage and wellness platform

Apply

Submit your resume, a 1-2 page statement on your technical leadership philosophy, and GitHub/portfolio links
to careers@cloudnativelabs.com with subject line 'Principal Full Stack Engineer Application.' Applications

reviewed on rolling basis. Candidates will participate in a technical deep-dive, architectural discussion, and
executive leadership alignment interview over 4-5 weeks.
